rows.label: qev013103_MSG0008
rows.name:
The only ones who know this place
are Fosdyke and Moahouse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0009
rows.name:
How could someone who isn't one of the
Celeste Three reach this place...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_SEL0021
rows.name:
Mediate, hoping for a
peaceful resolution.

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0002
rows.name:
I see, I was just thinking of doing the
same to you! There's no need for talk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What? You were asked by Fosdyke
and Moahouse to come stop me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Like I'd believe that! Them
betraying me... impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_SEL0031
rows.name: Explain again that it's the truth.

rows.label: qev013103_SEL0041
rows.name:
Voice your doubt that Briggs
was the one who betrayed them.

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0004
rows.name:
You're just spouting nonsense to
make me lower my guard, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hmph... You won't fool me!
I'll have you die right here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0006
rows.name:
What nonsense! Those two and I
are connected by a deep bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmph... You won't mislead me!
I'll have you die right here![ST:wait ]
